teaching:kabura:anchor-01.arabic: هُوَ كَبِيرٌ. أَنَا أَكْبَرُ مِنْهُ. وَاللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ مِنَّا، بَلْ، مِنْ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ
teaching:kabura:anchor-01.english: He is great. I am greater than him. And Allah is greater than us — rather, than everything.
teaching:kabura:anchor-01.score_notes: Made-up teaching phrase. Uses 3 forms in one flowing sentence. Builds from human comparison to divine.

lesson_use.arabic: هُوَ كَبِيرٌ. أَنَا أَكْبَرُ مِنْهُ. وَاللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ مِنَّا، بَلْ، مِنْ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ
lesson_use.english: He is great. I am greater than him. And Allah is greater than us — rather, than everything.
lesson_use.notes: Made-up teaching phrase. Uses 3 forms in one flowing sentence. Builds from human comparison to divine — landing on اللهُ أَكْبَرُ.
